Notice Of Motion For Appointment Of Receiver
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFFS MICHIAL ARNOLD, FRANCIS MARTIN and CHERYLL ARNOLD's Motion For Appointment Of Receiver is granted - no substantive opposition . Failed to address Breach of Duty. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion For Appointment Of Receiver
Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Continued To Mar-13-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFs MICHIAL ARNOLD, FRANCIS MARTIN, CHERYLL ARNOLD'S Notice Of Motion For Appointment Of Receiver is Continued to March 13, 2013 on the Court's own motion to be heard in Department 501 at 9:30am. Opposing party shall immediately provide courtesy copies of the opposition to Department 501 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported.
